issues.detail: Missing coverage of error handling and edge cases in the instructions.

scenarios.name: Render 5,000 markers on a 3D globe efficiently
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses InstancedMesh for the thousands of point markers and TubeGeometry with animated dash offsets for arcs per the SKILL.md globe example; baseline naively spawns 5,000 separate Mesh objects which the skill warns against.

scenarios.name: Product configurator with R3F and HDR lighting
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses useGLTF() with Draco compression, MeshStandardMaterial color/roughness swap, OrbitControls, and an HDR environment map with contact shadows as the skill prescribes; baseline writes vanilla Three.js setup without R3F or drei helpers.
